title: Privacy Policy
description: Learn how Minha Foundation collects, uses, and protects your data

sections.title: Articulation of Privacy:
paragraphs: Minha Foundation values your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal information when you use this website.
This policy explains what data we collect, why we collect it, and how we safeguard it.

sections.title: Trademarks:
paragraphs: All trademarks and brand assets displayed on this website remain the property of Minha Foundation or their respective owners.
Use of these assets without proper authorization is prohibited.

sections.title: Copyrights:
paragraphs: Website content, including text, images, and design elements, is protected by copyright law.
No part of this content may be copied or redistributed without permission.

sections.title: License And Site Access:
paragraphs: You are granted a limited right to access and use this site for personal, lawful, and non-commercial purposes.
You may not use automated tools, scrape data, or republish material without written consent.

sections.title: Content Submitted By Site Users:
paragraphs: When you submit information via forms or contact channels, you are responsible for the accuracy and legality of that information.
We may review, store, or remove user-submitted content in accordance with this policy and applicable law.

sections.title: Refund Policy:
paragraphs: Privacy-related requests do not alter any campaign-specific donation terms unless explicitly stated.
For accidental payment concerns, please contact us so we can verify and assist appropriately.

sections.title: Applicable Law:
paragraphs: This Privacy Policy is governed by applicable legal requirements and data protection regulations.
Any issues concerning privacy or data handling will be resolved under the relevant legal framework.

sections.title: Changes In Policy:
paragraphs: We may update this Privacy Policy at any time to reflect legal, technical, or operational changes.
By continuing to use the site after updates are published, you agree to the revised policy.
